title: Rating
description: Star control for collecting or displaying a score on a fixed scale. Use it for reviews, satisfaction steps, and read-only aggregates such as catalog averages.
intro: Bind `value` and listen to `valueChange`, cap the scale with `max`, toggle `readOnly` when the score is informational, and use `showValue` when the numeric ratio should stay visible beside the stars. `ariaLabel` and the two formatter inputs localize copy without reimplementing the control.

featureSections.title: Controlled value
featureSections.description: Treat the rating as a single choice on a fixed max. Keep `showValue` on when the denominator is not obvious from context.

featureSections.title: Density and modes
featureSections.description: `size` aligns the star control with surrounding text. Read-only turns the group into non-interactive presentation; disabled blocks input but preserves layout.

featureSections.title: Scale and published scores
featureSections.description: Raise `max` for longer scales. Pair interactive tuning with a read-only row when you need both editing and aggregate display in one screen.

featureSections.title: Names and formatters
featureSections.description: `ariaLabel` names the whole group for assistive tech. Override `starAriaLabelFormatter` and `currentValueAriaLabelFormatter` when defaults do not match your strings.

featureSections.title: Listing row
featureSections.description: Compact read-only stars next to metadata and a primary action mirror how ratings appear in catalogs and templates.

featureSections.title: Feedback form
featureSections.description: Combine stars with a textarea and actions so teams can paste a finished pattern instead of wiring isolated demos.

accessibility.title: Roles and states
accessibility.body: Interactive ratings expose `role="radiogroup"` on the root with `aria-disabled` when needed. Stars are `role="radio"` with `aria-checked` reflecting the filled state. Read-only mode uses `role="img"` on the root with `aria-readonly="true"` and static star nodes instead of buttons.

accessibility.title: Names
accessibility.body: Set `ariaLabel` for the group when the visible heading alone is insufficient. Per-star labels come from `starAriaLabelFormatter` or i18n defaults. The group label uses `currentValueAriaLabelFormatter` or i18n unless `ariaLabel` is set.

accessibility.title: Keyboard and focus
accessibility.body: Arrow keys move between stars, Home selects the first star, End the last, Space and Enter commit the focused star. A single star stays in the tab order at a time via `tabindex` so focus does not walk every glyph.

apiSections.title: RatingComponent - ui-rating
apiSections.lead: Standalone star rating. Binds with value and valueChange; defaults integrate with UiI18nService for star and summary strings when you do not pass custom formatters.

blocks.title: Inputs
rows: Current rating; clamped between zero and max().
Inclusive upper bound; length of the star strip.
Visual scale of stars and hit targets.
Presentation-only; no hover commit or clicks.
Disables buttons; keeps structure for layout.
Explicit accessible name for the group; overrides formatter-based group label when non-empty.
Per-star accessible name; defaults route through i18n when unchanged.
Group summary when ariaLabel is empty; defaults route through i18n when unchanged.

blocks.title: Outputs
rows: Emitted with the committed value after click or keyboard activation.

paragraphs: Hover previews the prospective value in interactive mode; leaving the control restores the bound value.
Values outside [0, max] are normalized; non-finite numbers fall back to safe defaults.
blocks.title: Notes
